g.title: SelfImage
g.text: Chiralogy self-image (proof-level, acentric rhizome). Regenerated by `lake exe depgraph-proof`.

The measured shape: a forest of ~19 co-equal roots (labelled growth points, each a distinct territory tint), not one base. The absences are the largest territory but one among many, not central. Gold boxes and edges = the lateral spine (chiasm statements and register instances) that threads the otherwise disjoint trees. Red dashed = proof-only (implicit). Modular by repetition, not fractal, not centred.
